message: Execute gate opened locally; preparing to invoke the legacy run.
warnings: Local lab-only queue execute gate is open via NV_BRIDGE_QUEUE_EXECUTE_OPT_IN.
Job metadata requested queue execute opt-in via metadata.queue_execute_opt_in=true.
Queue execute will prefer a bridge-owned hidden GUI launch when the singleton stack is not already open, and otherwise reuse the existing singleton GUI session.
Legacy landmark-map matching is disabled for queue execute; auto-align uses explicit/reference/registry/current seeds plus TrackCenter.
Queue execute auto-align requires Final >= 12.000 kcps before RunExperiment(handles) is allowed to proceed.
TrackCenter will try 3 z-seed positions with offsets [0.000, -0.500, 0.500] um from the current alignment seed.
